summary: Keep the project platform-role synchronization function internal by revoking authenticated execute.

notes: psa_sync_project_platform_roles remains callable internally from psa_save_project and by service_role, but is no longer exposed as an authenticated RPC.
This aligns production grants with FUNCTION_PERMISSION_INVENTORY and scripts/assert-function-grants.sql.

verification: Run static project-role platform sync migration coverage check.
Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.15.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.15.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
The frontend render smoke currently does not display the version on the unauthenticated login screen; server pre-deploy verifies the expected version in the app bundle.
